title: Directed Graphs, Strong Components, and Condensation · Scale Transfer
summary: Analyze circular dependencies and group mutually reachable services. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a strongly-connected dependency report with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use discovery and finish structure to reason about directed reachability.
Compute strongly connected components and validate mutual reachability within each result.
Collapse strong components into an acyclic condensation graph.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
